rationale: Acting on Review 1 fixes the demonstrably false module docstring claim (the two new finrank theorems use only minpoly/IsIntegral/Module.finrank_mul_finrank/restrictScalars_adjoin_eq_sup and never reference the normal-form lemmas or 'combine' with them), which Review 2's approval leaves in place; the inaccuracy is grounded in the exact changed docstring block and is material under the documentation rubric.
